# ev-vs-petrol-calc

> A free calculator that compares the true cost of owning and running an electric vehicle versus a petrol car over any time period you choose.

## Tools
- Electric car vs petrol cost calculator: estimates and compares total ownership costs including purchase price, fuel or charging costs, insurance, maintenance, and depreciation for electric and petrol vehicles side by side

## Topics covered
- Fuel and charging cost comparison over time
- Purchase price and depreciation differences between EVs and petrol cars
- Home charging versus public charging costs
- Petrol price trends and how they affect long-term running costs
- EV battery longevity and replacement cost considerations
- Government incentives, grants, and tax credits for electric vehicles
- Insurance cost differences between electric and petrol vehicles
- Maintenance and servicing cost comparisons
- Break-even point calculation for switching from petrol to electric
- Environmental cost and carbon footprint comparison

## Audience
This site is for anyone considering switching from a petrol car to an electric vehicle and wanting a clear, numbers-based comparison of the real costs involved.
